short: NVIDIA's next major AI chip platform, following Blackwell.
definition: NVIDIA Rubin (the Vera Rubin platform) is NVIDIA's next major AI compute platform, succeeding the Blackwell generation. It pairs a new CPU (Vera) and GPU (Rubin) with faster interconnects, aiming to improve performance per watt and lower the cost of large-scale training and inference. Specific specs and dates shift, so verify before publishing.
